underlying_goal: Implement a per-tenant feature flag for the Gen3 rule engine following the existing multi_ci_engines pattern, verify it with all test suites, update docs, and commit/push the changes.
friction_detail: Significant time lost chasing a pre-existing cicustom crash and a profile-loading issue caused by a shell alias's interactive prompt silently blocking the cp command.
brief_summary: User wanted a per-tenant rule engine flag implemented, tested, documented, and pushed; after extensive debugging of environment issues, all tests passed (109/174/85) and the change was committed and pushed.
